title: GST Voucher (GSTV) – Cash
text:
GST Voucher (GSTV) – Cash - SupportGoWhere
GST Voucher (GSTV) – Cash
Share link
Enhanced cash payouts up to $850 from 2024, to help lower-income Singaporeans, residing in Singapore, with their daily living expenses.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible Singapore Citizens can receive up to $850 of cash payout
Payouts will be disbursed in August each year
Collapse all sections
About this support

Enhanced cash payouts up to $850 from 2024

Payouts will be disbursed in August each year

Who is this for?

For GSTV – Cash Payout in 2026

Singapore Citizen residing in Singapore;

Aged 21 and above in 2026;

Assessable Income for Year of Assessment 2025 must not exceed $39,000;

Annual Value (AV) of home (as indicated on NRIC) not exceeding $31,000 as at 31 December 2025; and

Does not own more than 1 property.




How to apply?

No application needed if you have previously signed-up for past GSTV payouts

If you have never signed-up for past GSTV payouts, you can apply by logging in to the e-services on the govbenefits portal

Where can I find help?

View more details

1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Contact us

Scheme last updated 29 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
